title: yeekz Vanilla PVP Pack
description: Minimalist PvP pack: downsized items, darkened GUI, and removed particles.
body:
Classic Aesthetics, Optimized for PvP

This project preserves the authentic vanilla Minecraft look while completely overhauling how items and interfaces are displayed, giving you a distinct competitive advantage.

Compact PvP Items
All handheld items—especially swords, tools, and weapons—have been significantly downsized. This miniaturization maximizes your field of view, ensuring that your equipment takes up less screen space and allowing you to track opponents more effectively during intense combat.

Darkened & Streamlined UI
The interface has been refined for a sleeker, darker aesthetic. By darkening the GUI, the game feels less intrusive and easier on the eyes, reducing glare during long gaming sessions while maintaining a clean, professional look.

Streamlined Utilities
Utility items, such as blocks, buckets, and interactable objects, have also been scaled down. This creates a compact, minimalist look that reduces visual clutter without sacrificing the familiar vanilla style.

Clarity & Focus (Particle Removal)
To ensure a distraction-free experience and maintain total visibility, unnecessary particle effects have been disabled:

No Eating Debris: Food items are consumed without visual crumbs or particles.

Clean Block Breaking: Breaking blocks no longer produces flying fragments, ensuring your view remains unobstructed during high-paced gameplay.

Created by: Yeekz
